name: PlanetMedia SA
summary: PlanetMedia SA publishes consumer Websites in France. It operates Planet.fr, which provides news and entertainment; Medisite.fr that offers health and well-being related services; Femmesplus.fr, which provides women related services; Planetgolf.fr, a golf directory; and PlanetRegime.fr, a weight loss coaching Website. The company was formerly known as Planet.fr SA. The company is based in Paris, France.
